section_name: Authority of Department to adopt regulations concerning special mobile equipment.
text: The Department may adopt regulations relating to the administration and enforcement of provisions in chapters 484A to 484E , inclusive, of NRS pertaining to special mobile equipment as defined in NRS 484A.245 .
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484A
##### § 484A.470 — Authority of Department to adopt regulations concerning special mobile equipment.

The Department may adopt regulations relating to the administration and enforcement of provisions in chapters 484A to 484E , inclusive, of NRS pertaining to special mobile equipment as defined in NRS 484A.245 .

subsections.text: The Department may adopt regulations relating to the administration and enforcement of provisions in chapters 484A to 484E , inclusive, of NRS pertaining to special mobile equipment as defined in NRS 484A.245 .
